headline: Williams Is No AI Pipe Dream. The Stock Is a Winner.
summary: Midstream operator  Williams Cos.  an energy middleman whose pipelines act as toll roads, handles roughly one-third of all the natural gas in the U.S. every day, connecting it from where it’s produced to where it’s used.  It’s one of the latest beneficiaries of artificial intelligence, as the company helps to provide some of the juice that increasingly electricity-hungry data centers require.  “Williams has articulated an expectation for potentially 10% earnings growth through the end of the decade and even beyond; eight to 10 years is sort of the time frame,” says Ben Cook, portfolio manager of the Hennessy Midstream fund, which owns the shares.
